name: get_matrix
description: Calculate a distance and/or duration matrix between multiple origin and destination points. Returns an NxM matrix where each cell contains the travel distance or duration between one origin and one destination. Useful for solving logistics problems like finding the closest facility, optimizing delivery routes, or computing travel times between many locations simultaneously.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: The transport mode. Path parameter. Options: driving-car, driving-hgv, cycling-regular, foot-walking, foot-hiking.

parameters.name: locations
parameters.description: Array of [longitude, latitude] coordinate pairs. All locations act as both origins and destinations unless 'sources' and 'destinations' are specified.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Array of indices (0-based) from the locations array to use as origins. Example: [0, 1] means only the first two locations are origins.

parameters.name: destinations
parameters.description: Array of indices (0-based) from the locations array to use as destinations. Example: [2, 3] means only the third and fourth locations are destinations.

parameters.name: metrics
parameters.description: Array of metrics to compute. Options: 'distance' (meters), 'duration' (seconds). Default is ['duration'].

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Unit system for distances. Options: m (meters, default), km, mi (miles).
